name: @wxyc/concerts-artist-lml-resolver
description: WXYC daily cron (BS#1614): resolve clean unresolved concerts.headlining_artist_raw names to Discogs artist ids via LML's verify-before-mint POST /api/v1/artists/resolve/bulk (LML#759), writing headlining_discogs_artist_id (+ provenance + attempt-at marker) and FK-loop-closing headlining_artist_id when the Discogs id maps to exactly one library artist. Runs after the 05:05 triangle-shows pull and the 05:15 strict/alias resolver so the SQL arms get first claim; cooperative pause defers when DJs are active.
